text.title: AI-Native Product Development Operating Model Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Use it when the input shape changes or before scaling a pilot.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the feature include LLM/AI behavior in production?

conclusion.verdict: Use vanilla product-ops; this methodology adds no value.
Halt; write evals + thresholds before any further engineering.

branch.when: ai_in_prod == true AND eval_set_defined == true AND guardrail_status != 'passed'

conclusion.verdict: Run guardrail review; do not roll out until 'passed'.

branch.when: ai_in_prod == true AND eval_set_defined == true AND guardrail_status == 'passed'

conclusion.verdict: Roll out with dual-loop telemetry; monitor model + product metrics.

example.trace: ai_in_prod=true → eval_set_defined=true → guardrail_status=passed → dual-loop telemetry rollout.
